text:
Been working on a different Agentic AI concept, but the Agent is under performing and coding and its not actually useful (unlike <https://observablehq.com/@tomlarkworthy/robocoop-2|robocoop-2> which is good).

Switched to getting a nice way to remember state. Using IndexDB to persist across page refreshes and mutable FileAttachments to carry state between exports (<https://observablehq.com/@tomlarkworthy/local-state|localState>).
Brought in ProseMirror to make a notion-like directly editable markdown interface (<https://observablehq.com/@tomlarkworthy/markdowninput|markdownInput>), because its quite annoying to have to write markdown using a programming language and I want to write more in Lopecode.
